instruction: What are your support hours?
response: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm CET.

instruction: How do I reset my password?
response: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the email instructions.

instruction: Where can I find my invoices?
response: You can find all invoices under Account Settings, then Billing, then Invoices.

instruction: How do I contact customer support?
response: You can reach us at support@company.com or via the in-app chat, Monday to Friday 9am-6pm CET.

instruction: What payment methods do you accept?
response: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and SEPA bank transfers for European customers.

instruction: How do I upgrade my plan?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Billing, and click Upgrade Plan to choose a new tier.

instruction: How do I downgrade my plan?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Billing, and click Change Plan. The new plan starts at the next billing cycle.

instruction: Can I get a refund?
response: Refunds are issued within 14 days of purchase if you have not used more than 10% of your plan's quota.

instruction: How do I cancel my account?
response: Go to Account Settings and click Cancel Account at the bottom of the page. Your data is kept for 30 days.

instruction: Do you offer student discounts?
response: Yes, we offer a 50% student discount. Email education@company.com from your school address to apply.

instruction: Where are your offices located?
response: Our headquarters are in Berlin, with additional offices in San Francisco and Singapore.

instruction: Do you have an API?
response: Yes, we offer a REST API. You can find the full documentation at docs.company.com/api.

instruction: How do I generate an API key?
response: Go to Account Settings, select API Keys, and click Generate New Key. Copy and store it securely.

instruction: What is your uptime SLA?
response: Our paid plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA. Service credits are issued if we fall below this threshold.

instruction: How do I invite team members?
response: Open the Team page from the sidebar, click Invite Member, and enter the email address.

instruction: Can I change my email address?
response: Yes, go to Account Settings, click Edit next to your email, and confirm the change via the verification email.

instruction: How is my data secured?
response: All data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3. We are SOC 2 Type II certified.

instruction: Do you offer single sign-on?
response: Yes, SSO via SAML 2.0 and OIDC is available on our Business and Enterprise plans.

instruction: How long does onboarding take?
response: Most customers are fully set up within one business day. Enterprise onboarding includes a 30-minute kickoff call.

instruction: Where can I find product tutorials?
response: Visit our Help Center at help.company.com, or the Tutorials section in your dashboard.

instruction: What languages do you support?
response: The product is available in English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, and Japanese.

instruction: How do I export my data?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Data, and click Export. You will receive a download link by email within 24 hours.

instruction: Do you sign DPAs?
response: Yes, we sign Data Processing Agreements for all paid plans. Email legal@company.com to request one.

instruction: Are you GDPR compliant?
response: Yes, we are fully GDPR compliant. Our processing terms are available at company.com/legal/gdpr.

instruction: Where is my data hosted?
response: Data is hosted in AWS regions in Frankfurt (eu-central-1) and Virginia (us-east-1), based on your account region.

instruction: Can I migrate from another provider?
response: Yes, we offer free migration assistance. Contact migration@company.com to schedule a call with our team.

instruction: How long is the free trial?
response: Our free trial is 14 days, no credit card required. You can extend it once for another 14 days from your dashboard.

instruction: What happens after the trial ends?
response: Your account switches to the Free tier with limited features. Your data is preserved and you can upgrade anytime.

instruction: Is there a setup fee?
response: No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans, including Enterprise.

instruction: Do you have a mobile app?
response: Yes, our mobile app is available on iOS and Android. Search for Company in the App Store or Google Play.

instruction: How do I change the workspace owner?
response: Only the current owner can transfer ownership. Go to Team Settings and click Transfer Ownership next to a member.

instruction: What is your data retention policy?
response: Active accounts retain data indefinitely. Cancelled accounts are kept for 30 days then permanently deleted.

instruction: Can I have multiple workspaces?
response: Yes, you can create up to 5 workspaces on the Pro plan and unlimited workspaces on Business and above.

instruction: How do I report a bug?
response: Use the Help menu in the app and select Report a Bug, or email bugs@company.com with steps to reproduce.

instruction: Do you offer phone support?
response: Phone support is available on the Enterprise plan. Pro and Business customers get priority email and chat support.

instruction: What browsers are supported?
response: We support the latest two versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported.

instruction: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
response: Go to Account Settings, select Security, and click Enable 2FA. We support TOTP apps and SMS.

instruction: What is your service status page?
response: You can check real-time status at status.company.com. Subscribe to receive incident notifications by email or Slack.

instruction: Do you have webhooks?
response: Yes, webhooks are available on Business and Enterprise plans. Configure them under Settings, then Integrations.

instruction: What is the rate limit on the API?
response: Free plans get 60 requests per minute. Pro: 600 rpm. Business: 6000 rpm. Enterprise: custom limits.

instruction: Can I white-label the product?
response: White-labeling is available on the Enterprise plan and includes custom domain, logo, and email branding.

instruction: How do I report a security issue?
response: Email security@company.com with details. We follow responsible disclosure and offer rewards for valid reports.

instruction: Do you have a roadmap?
response: Yes, our public roadmap is at company.com/roadmap. Customers on Business+ can request feature priority.

instruction: Can I pay annually?
response: Yes, annual billing saves 20% over monthly. Switch under Account Settings, Billing, Change Billing Cycle.

instruction: Is there a non-profit discount?
response: Yes, we offer a 30% discount for registered non-profits. Email nonprofit@company.com with your 501(c)(3) or equivalent.

instruction: How do I delete my account permanently?
response: Cancel your subscription, then email privacy@company.com from your account email to request immediate deletion.

instruction: What happens if my payment fails?
response: We retry the payment over 7 days. If it still fails, the account moves to read-only until billing is updated.

instruction: Can I have custom contracts?
response: Yes, custom contracts and MSAs are available on the Enterprise plan. Contact sales@company.com to start the process.

instruction: How do I reactivate a cancelled account?
response: Log in within 30 days of cancellation and click Reactivate. After 30 days the account and data are permanently deleted.

instruction: Do you support audit logs?
response: Yes, audit logs are available on Business and Enterprise plans, with 90-day and 1-year retention respectively.
